title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform that enables users to define YAML-based agentic workflows running in isolated git worktrees across any model provider. The marketplace will allow users to share, discover, and install pre-built workflows, addressing the current limitation where each user rebuilds workflows privately.
